                  "lineNumber": 91,

                  "isContextLine": true

                  "content": "        }",
                  "isContextLine": true

                {
                  "lineNumber": 93,
                  "content": "      ],",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 94,
                  "content": "      \"source\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 95,
                  "content": "        \"import time\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 96,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 97,
                  "content": "        \"t_start_load = time.perf_counter()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 98,
                  "content": "        \"clip_ids = pd.read_parquet(\\\"clip_ids.parquet\\\")[\\\"clip_id\\\"].tolist()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 99,
                  "content": "        \"clip_id = clip_ids[650]\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 100,
                  "content": "        \"# clip_id = '030c760c-ae38-49aa-9ad8-f5650a545d26'\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 101,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 102,
                  "content": "        \"data = load_physical_aiavdataset(clip_id)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 103,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 104,
                  "content": "        \"messages = helper.create_message(data[\\\"image_frames\\\"].flatten(0, 1))\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 105,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 106,
                  "content": "        \"inputs = processor.apply_chat_template(\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 107,
                  "content": "        \"    messages,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 108,
                  "content": "        \"    tokenize=True,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 109,
                  "content": "        \"    add_generation_prompt=False,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 110,
                  "content": "        \"    continue_final_message=True,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 111,
                  "content": "        \"    return_dict=True,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 112,
                  "content": "        \"    return_tensors=\\\"pt\\\",\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 113,
                  "content": "        \")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 114,
                  "content": "        \"print(\\\"seq length:\\\", inputs.input_ids.shape)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 115,
                  "content": "        \"model_inputs = {\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 116,
                  "content": "        \"    \\\"tokenized_data\\\": inputs,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 117,
                  "content": "        \"    \\\"ego_history_xyz\\\": data[\\\"ego_history_xyz\\\"],\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 118,
                  "content": "        \"    \\\"ego_history_rot\\\": data[\\\"ego_history_rot\\\"],\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 119,
                  "content": "        \"}\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 120,
                  "content": "        \"model_inputs = helper.to_device(model_inputs, \\\"cuda\\\")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 121,
                  "content": "        \"if torch.cuda.is_available():\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 122,
                  "content": "        \"    torch.cuda.synchronize()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 123,
                  "content": "        \"t_end_load = time.perf_counter()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 124,
                  "content": "        \"timing_load_ms = (t_end_load - t_start_load) * 1000.0\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 132,
                  "content": "      \"source\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 133,
                  "content": "        \"### Model inference\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 134,
                  "content": "      ]",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 135,
                  "content": "    },",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },

                  "lineNumber": 136,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 138,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 139,

                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 140,
                  "content": "      \"metadata\": {},",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 141,
                  "content": "      \"outputs\": [",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 142,
                  "content": "        {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 143,
                  "content": "          \"name\": \"stdout\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 144,
                  "content": "          \"output_type\": \"stream\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 145,
                  "content": "          \"text\": [",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 146,
                  "content": "            \"Chain-of-Causation (per trajectory):\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 147,
                  "content": "            \" [['Nudge left to increase clearance from the construction sign encroaching into the lane.']]\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 148,
                  "content": "            \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 149,
                  "content": "            \"=== 耗时统计 ===\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 150,
                  "content": "            \"数据加载与预处理: 6157.44 ms\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 151,
                  "content": "            \"Vision Encoder:   99.05 ms\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 152,
                  "content": "            \"CoT 推理:         667.05 ms\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 153,
                  "content": "            \"轨迹生成:         103.90 ms\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 154,
                  "content": "            \"模型推理总耗时:   783.36 ms\\n\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 155,
                  "content": "          ]",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 156,
                  "content": "        }",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 157,
                  "content": "      ],",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 158,
                  "content": "      \"source\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 159,
                  "content": "        \"if torch.cuda.is_available():\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 160,
                  "content": "        \"    torch.cuda.synchronize()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 161,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 162,
                  "content": "        \"torch.cuda.manual_seed_all(42)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 163,
                  "content": "        \"with torch.autocast(\\\"cuda\\\", dtype=torch.bfloat16):\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 164,
                  "content": "        \"    t_start_infer = time.perf_counter()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 165,
                  "content": "        \"    pred_xyz, pred_rot, extra = model.sample_trajectories_from_data_with_vlm_rollout(\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 166,
                  "content": "        \"        data=copy.deepcopy(model_inputs),\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 167,
                  "content": "        \"        top_p=0.98,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 168,
                  "content": "        \"        temperature=0.6,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 169,
                  "content": "        \"        num_traj_samples=1,  # Feel free to raise this for more output trajectories and CoC traces.\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 170,
                  "content": "        \"        max_generation_length=256,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 171,
                  "content": "        \"        return_extra=True,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 172,
                  "content": "        \"    )\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 173,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 174,
                  "content": "        \"if torch.cuda.is_available():\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 175,
                  "content": "        \"    torch.cuda.synchronize()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 176,
                  "content": "        \"t_end_infer = time.perf_counter()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 177,
                  "content": "        \"timing_infer_ms = (t_end_infer - t_start_infer) * 1000.0\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 178,
                  "content": "        \"timing_cot_ms = float(\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 179,
                  "content": "        \"    extra.get(\\\"timing_cot_ms\\\", float(extra.get(\\\"timing_cot_s\\\", float(\\\"nan\\\"))) * 1000.0)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 180,
                  "content": "        \")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 181,
                  "content": "        \"timing_vision_ms = float(extra.get(\\\"timing_vision_ms\\\", float(\\\"nan\\\")))\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 182,
                  "content": "        \"timing_traj_gen_ms = float(\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 183,
                  "content": "        \"    extra.get(\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 184,
                  "content": "        \"        \\\"timing_traj_gen_ms\\\",\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 185,
                  "content": "        \"        float(extra.get(\\\"timing_traj_gen_s\\\", float(\\\"nan\\\"))) * 1000.0,\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 186,
                  "content": "        \"    )\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 187,
                  "content": "        \")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 188,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true

                {
                  "lineNumber": 253,
                  "content": "              \"&lt;Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes&gt;\"",
                  "isContextLine": true

                  "content": "            ]",

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 260,
                  "content": "      \"source\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 261,
                  "content": "        \"import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 262,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 263,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 264,
                  "content": "        \"def rotate_90cc(xy):\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 265,
                  "content": "        \"    # Rotate (x, y) by 90 deg CCW -&gt; (y, -x)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 266,
                  "content": "        \"    return np.stack([-xy[1], xy[0]], axis=0)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 267,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 268,
                  "content": "        \"\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 269,
                  "content": "        \"for i in range(pred_xyz.shape[2]):\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 270,
                  "content": "        \"    pred_xy = pred_xyz.cpu()[0, 0, i, :, :2].T.numpy()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 271,
                  "content": "        \"    pred_xy_rot = rotate_90cc(pred_xy)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 272,
                  "content": "        \"    gt_xy = data[\\\"ego_future_xyz\\\"].cpu()[0, 0, :, :2].T.numpy()\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 273,
                  "content": "        \"    gt_xy_rot = rotate_90cc(gt_xy)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 274,
                  "content": "        \"    plt.plot(*pred_xy_rot, \\\"o-\\\", label=f\\\"Predicted Trajectory #{i + 1}\\\")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 275,
                  "content": "        \"plt.ylabel(\\\"y coordinate (meters)\\\")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 276,
                  "content": "        \"plt.xlabel(\\\"x coordinate (meters)\\\")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 277,
                  "content": "        \"plt.plot(*gt_xy_rot, \\\"r-\\\", label=\\\"Ground Truth Trajectory\\\")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 278,
                  "content": "        \"plt.legend(loc=\\\"best\\\")\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 279,
                  "content": "        \"plt.axis(\\\"equal\\\")\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 280,
                  "content": "      ]",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 281,
                  "content": "    },",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },

                  "lineNumber": 282,
                  "content": "    {",
                  "isContextLine": true

                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 296,
                  "content": "      \"source\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 297,
                  "content": "        \"pred_xy = pred_xyz.cpu().numpy()[0, 0, :, :, :2].transpose(0, 2, 1)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 298,
                  "content": "        \"diff = np.linalg.norm(pred_xy - gt_xy[None, ...], axis=1).mean(-1)\\n\",",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 299,
                  "content": "        \"print(\\\"minADE:\\\", diff.min(), \\\"meters\\\")\"",
